caption: A man with a mustache, wearing a white shirt and a maroon vest, speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" while standing outdoors next to a car. He gestures with his right hand as he speaks. To his left and right are smaller inset portraits of other men, including one identified as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and others as "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार." The top of the screen features a red banner with white text that reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and identifies the speaker as "जीवेश मिश्रा, विधायक, BJP, बिहार." A timestamp in the bottom right corner shows "10:04 PM." As the scene progresses, a red banner appears at the bottom of the screen with white text that says "शपथ लेने के बाद नीतीश कुमार," which later changes to "शपथ लेने के बाद नीतीश कुमार का बयान."
